title: CalendarEvent
description: A NYC public schools calendar event — holiday, recess, no-school day, professional development day, or first/last day. Modeled from the /calendar page on schools.nyc.gov. NO Open Data twin exists — a real (if small) gap; proposed as a first-class dataset/resource.

title.description: Event title, e.g. 'Winter Recess', 'First Day of School'.

appliesTo.description: Which populations the event applies to (all students, staff, specific grades).
